message:
chore: update NTM agent logs and add session summary

Update agent mail (am) and context manager (cm) NTM session logs with
latest activity. Add session summary from 2026-04-07 swarm run.

Skipped: rate_limits.json (ephemeral runtime state, regenerated per session)

- Update .ntm/logs/am-coding_agent_session_search.log
- Update .ntm/logs/cm-coding_agent_session_search.log
- Add .ntm/summaries/coding_agent_session_search-20260407-115237.json

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
